item.text: The system must never include in search result lists any record which the user does not have the right to access.

item.text: The system must maintain the audit trail for as long as required, keeping it at least for the life of the case to which it refers.

grounded_items.best_supporting_context: When we say these records need to be 'unalterable,' we mean exactly that: the audit trail data cannot be modified in any way or deleted by any user. As for retention, we have to maintain the audit trail for as long as required, which means keeping it at least for the life of the case to which it refers. Finally, we will sometimes need to pull this data out for review, so we need the ability to export audit trails for specified cases, but doing so must happen without affecting the audit trail stored by the System.
